calibration_audit.description:
Audit the calibration of a fitted predictive model on the internal
validation predictions. Emits the Brier score, the reliability curve
(binned predicted vs observed), expected and maximum calibration
error (ECE / MCE), and a SME-facing pass/fail per a configured
Brier threshold (e.g., Brier ≤ 0.10 for binary clinical prediction).
Recommends a calibration method (Platt / isotonic / temperature
scaling) only when the audit fails the threshold; recommendation
is advisory — calibration retraining is gated by SME approval.

clinical_feature_extraction.description:
Windowed vital-sign / lab / treatment feature extraction for clinical
prediction. Builds a per-(patient, prediction-window) feature matrix
from labeled-cohort timestamps, optionally aggregated through standard
EHR feature frameworks (MIMIC-Extract, concepts library, FIDDLE).
Runs a mandatory leakage audit that asserts no feature window overlaps
the label-derivation window (e.g., the Sepsis-3 SOFA + suspected
infection window); the audit emits a per-feature `crosses_label_window`
flag and refuses to emit features that cross the boundary.

clinical_label_derivation.description:
Derive ground-truth labels (e.g., Sepsis-3 onset, hospital mortality,
AKI stage) from raw EHR tables. Canonical derivations come from
community-maintained code (e.g., mimic-code `sepsis3` table, eICU
helpers); ICD-only labels are a known failure mode and must be
rejected by the agent's runtime check. Emits a labeled cohort
table with one row per (patient, encounter, prediction window)
and the derived outcome columns + onset timestamps.

data_import.description:
Import structured tabular or domain-formatted inputs (CDISC ADaM/SDTM, time-series
panels, pre-computed count matrices) supplied by the SME. Mirrors `data_acquisition`
but for the clinical-trial and time-series-forecast project classes where inputs
are files-on-disk rather than repository accessions.

discover_calibration_audit.description: Discover method for calibration_audit (options: sklearn_calibration_curve, netcal, custom_platt, custom_isotonic). Surface set_intake_method.

discover_clinical_feature_extraction.description: Discover method for clinical_feature_extraction (options: mimic_extract, concepts_library, fiddle, custom_window_aggregator). Surface set_intake_method.

discover_clinical_label_derivation.description: Discover method for clinical_label_derivation (options: mimic_code_sepsis3, eicu_helpers, custom_sql_concepts). Surface set_intake_method.

discover_external_validation.description: Discover method for external_validation (options: sklearn_metrics, custom_external_scorer). Surface set_intake_method.

discover_fairness_audit.description: Discover method for fairness_audit (options: fairlearn, aequitas, custom_subgroup_bootstrap). Surface set_intake_method.

discover_predictive_model_fit.description: Discover method for predictive_model_fit (options: xgboost, lightgbm, lstm, tcn, transformer). Surface set_intake_method.

external_validation.description:
Re-evaluate a trained predictive model on a holdout external cohort
(e.g., eICU-CRD when the model was trained on MIMIC-IV). Repeats
label derivation, feature extraction, and prediction generation
using the SAME pipeline contracts as the internal pass, then scores
the model's predictions against the external cohort's labels.
Emits AUROC, AUPRC, calibration, fairness metrics plus a transport
diagnostic (feature-distribution shift, label-prevalence shift)
so SMEs see whether degradation is statistical drop or distribution
shift. External AUROC is expected to drop 0.05-0.15 relative to
internal validation; this is not interpreted as model failure
absent other signals.

fairness_audit.description:
Audit subgroup performance differentials for a fitted clinical
prediction model. Computes AUROC, AUPRC, sensitivity, specificity,
and calibration metrics per stratification axis (typically age,
sex, race/ethnicity, hospital-of-origin) plus pairwise subgroup
differentials with bootstrap confidence intervals. Emits a
fairness report and a SME-facing pass/fail per configured
differential thresholds. Subgroup membership comes from the
labeled-cohort sensitive-attribute columns; absent stratifiers
surface as a configurable blocker rather than silently dropping
the axis.

final_reporting.description:
Assemble the project-level final report: cross-stage narrative, dashboard
index, key figures, methods + caveats. Final node before SME review.

predictive_model_fit.description:
Fit one or more clinical-prediction model families against the
windowed feature matrix. Method-neutral: the agent picks the model
family from the SME-named candidate list (typically gradient-boosted
trees — XGBoost / LightGBM — plus a sequence model — LSTM / TCN /
Transformer) at runtime. Emits trained-model artifacts and per-row
predicted probabilities on an internal validation split; cross-
validation and hyperparameter-search logs are committed to the
fitting report.

reporting.description:
Assemble narrative tables, figures, and summary text from upstream stage
outputs into a per-stage HTML / Markdown report. Modality-agnostic; bio
taxonomies override the description at the include site to specify what
goes into the report.
